results.rendered_html:
svargin a. [svargo'styasya bhogyatvena ini] Belonging to heaven, heavenly.
— m.
1 A god, deity, an immortal; tvamapi vitatayajñaḥ svargiṇaḥ prīṇayālaṃ  Ś. 7. 34 ;  Me. 30 ;  Ku. 2. 45. 
2 A dead or deceased man.
